description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a modern, open-plan interior layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The front features a pastel-colored door and a small entryway, while the rear and sides display a mix of sliding glass doors and standard windows. Inside, the bungalow is divided into distinct rooms including a kitchen, living area, bedroom, and bathroom, all furnished with contemporary decor. The roof is flat, contributing to the modern aesthetic, and the structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or plaster with glass window panels. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a pastel front door. The interior is open-plan and contemporary, with distinct living, kitchen, and bedroom spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pastel-colored entry door, solid white facade, and glimpses of the bedroom and living area through the windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large corner window, bookshelves, and interior furnishings, with the bathroom visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sliding glass doors, a bay window, and the open-plan kitchen and living area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, the kitchen, and the bathroom area, with less detail of the entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and corner windows
